race.description: The Midfield Group Colin Mckenna Wangoom Hcp (L)
race.comment: Terrific race as always. LA FRACAS (6) has the figures and form to go close. Solid in the Star Kingdom in Sydney then charged late and found one better in Recon in the Hareeba Stakes last time. Looks hard to hold out again. OLIVEANOTHERDAY (14) is a progressive local no doubt set for this after winning all three this time in. Went from a Ballarat win to a Caulfield BM66 to a Caulfield open class win to bring up the hat-trick. Returns home and will push forward and take beating. GREAT MAXIMUS (11) is an SA galloper building to a win, the latest runner-up in the Hills Railway at Oakbank when kept coming. Loves soft ground and is close to breaking through. CORNICHE (2) was a Listed winner at Flemington two back then might not have enjoyed the firmer footing in the Hareeba last time. Grows a leg in softer ground and worth another chance. IMMORTAL STAR (13) was thereabouts in the Hareeba and looks a huge chance on best figures.
